action.label: Actions
action.description: Controls that trigger operations, submit data, or navigate.

overlay.label: Overlays
overlay.description: Floating surfaces that layer above page content and require user dismissal.

form.label: Forms
form.description: Input controls and layout primitives for collecting structured user data.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.description: Non-interactive indicators that communicate status, progress, or results.

navigation.label: Navigation
navigation.description: Wayfinding controls that move users between views, sections, or steps.

data-display.label: Data Display
data-display.description: Read-only presentational components for structured data and content.

layout.label: Layout
layout.description: Structural primitives that control spacing, containment, and composition.

typography.label: Typography
typography.description: Text-rendering components that enforce hierarchy and typographic conventions.

domain.label: Domain
domain.description: Application-specific components that encode product-level business concepts.

statusLevels.stable: Public API under semver protection; breaking changes require a major version bump.
statusLevels.beta: API is near-final but may have breaking changes in minor versions before promotion.
statusLevels.alpha: Experimental; no stability guarantee and subject to removal or significant redesign.
statusLevels.domain-suite: A cohesive set of domain-specific components shipped together as a named suite with its own versioning cadence.

components.purpose: Opinionated conversation surface bundling message list, composer, attachments, and scroll affordances for AI or support transcripts.
useWhen: Shipping a full chat surface with composer, scroll-anchor, unread indicator, and attachments bundled as one heavyweight drop-in.
Building an AI assistant or support thread where conversation state is modeled as a transcript of role-tagged messages.
Embedding Chat in a definite-height flex or grid region where its internal transcript should own scrolling.

avoidWhen.reason: Rendering a one-off message list — compose lighter primitives directly instead of pulling the full suite.
The transcript is read-only and needs no composer — a simple list of message bubbles is a better fit.

components.name: Chat

components.purpose: Chat composer-bound slash-command and mention listbox primitive.
useWhen: Adding slash commands, mentions, or autocomplete to ChatInput without re-implementing combobox ARIA.
Composer suggestions should stay anchored to the active token and leave command definitions in application code.

avoidWhen.reason: Opening a global command launcher detached from the composer — use command-palette instead.
Anchoring a generic command menu to an arbitrary input — use command-menu instead.

notes: Passes combobox role and aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-activedescendant, and aria-autocomplete through to ChatInput's composer overlay API.

components.name: ChatComposerPopover

components.purpose: Header primitive for the active Chat conversation, composed as a sibling above Chat rather than inside it.
useWhen: Showing the active conversation title, participants, status, and export controls above a Chat transcript.
Building a multi-conversation chat layout where the list, header, and Chat surface are composed as siblings.

avoidWhen.reason: Rendering the conversation switcher — use chat-conversation-list.
Rendering the transcript body and composer — use chat.

components.name: ChatConversationHeader

components.purpose: Conversation navigation list for switching among Chat transcripts without embedding the list inside Chat.
useWhen: Rendering a multi-conversation chat sidebar beside one active Chat transcript.
Showing unread counts and last-message previews for compatible conversation snapshots.

avoidWhen.reason: Rendering the message transcript itself — use chat for the active conversation surface.
Building app-wide primary navigation — use side-navigation or navigation-bar.

components.name: ChatConversationList
